=== bd1990-09-05_oklahoma-city.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 9/5/90, Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, Civic Center, 1CDR

Same as LB-3724 (this is actually a new rip from the same cd-r as described in brackets at the entry for LB-3724, I didn't keep the flacs back then)


01 Old MacDonald Had A Farm (Instrumental) [01:00.45], 02 Silvio [03:0.60], 03 Man In The Long Black Coat [04:09.70], 04 I Want You [05:07.36], 05 Masters Of War [04:30.50], 06 Just Like A Woman [05:29.21], 07 Gotta Serve Somebody [05:14.19], 08 Girl From The North Country [04:36.51], 09 Trail Of The Buffalo [06:15.25], [39:36.02]

incomplete show, the following songs were performed but does not circulate:

10 Mr. Tambourine Man, 11 Gates Of Eden, 12 Everything Is Broken, 13 Every Grain Of Sand, 14 All Along The Watchtower, 15 Shooting Star, 16 I Shall Be Released, 17 Like A Rolling Stone, 18 Blowin' In The Wind, 19 Highway 61 Revisited
